name: Olive Tapenade
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Fresh Parsley, Chopped OR 4 tsp Dried Parsley, Crushed
3 tbsp Fresh Basil, Chopped OR 1 tbsp Dried Basil, Crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop and mash the anchovies on a cutting board.
2. Transfer them to a bowl and mix with chopped olives and Worcestershire sauce.
3. Blend in the mayonnaise and add all remaining ingredients, blending well.
4. Cover and chill.
Makes about 2 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Scallions, French Bread, Seafood
